_notes: ADA ticket-resolver config. Scripts derive the repo root from the skill's own location (<repo>/.claude/skills/ada-resolve-ticket/), override with env ADA_REPO. All commands run on Frazer's Mac under Claude Code, not in any sandbox.

deploy.note: Pushing/merging to main triggers .github/workflows/deploy.yml -> cip-backend-staging + cip-frontend-staging (~7 min). Production is a separate manual push to the 'production' branch and is NEVER done by the resolver.

staging_urls._fill: Populate once: gcloud run services describe cip-backend-staging --project point-blank-ada --region northamerica-northeast1 --format 'value(status.url)' (and cip-frontend-staging). Left blank -> the smoke agent reports the URL is needed rather than guessing.

park._note: diagnostics engine (backend/services/diagnostics/) was moved from park -> auto on 2026-07-07 at Frazer's request; he runs this skill only when comfortable auto-promoting engine changes. Residual guards remain: data-moving/transform files below, any .sql, and a ticket body that explicitly asks for review (see claim.py _notes_force_park).
